themes.exampleQuote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
There were a lot of good options for drinks! Both drinks my sister and I tried were delicious.
I just wish this place was bigger, gets packed quickly!
The workers are so nice every time I visit!
I asked for a blueberry muffin, received a raisin/walnut muffin, let them know, I had to pay for a new muffin.
The wi-fi isn't good enough to work from here so I wouldn't come back for that.

notable_quote: The strawberry matcha here might be the best I've ever had.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers keep coming back to the specialty drinks, particularly the strawberry matcha and iced tiramisu latte, while the small footprint, unreliable wifi, and an order-correction policy that cost a customer money are the recurring friction points.
quarter_narrative: Sixteen Pittsburgh creators posted 17 TikToks about Delanie's Coffee Shadyside this quarter, generating over 66,000 plays, and the shop's own account did not post a single one in return. That gap is the defining story of its Spring 2026. The family leader this issue, Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange, built its top position on social momentum it controlled; Delanie's is sitting on borrowed momentum it cannot yet convert. The rank climbs when the shop turns creator energy into a signal it owns, because the drink lineup and the Creator Fit reading are already doing the heavy lifting.
tldr_read: Creator coverage is outpacing the shop's own output by a wide margin, with review sentiment below the family median. Ones to Watch, #4 in Pittsburgh Coffee Shops.
tldr_meaning: The Creator Fit reading is the strongest in the family, but without the shop's own posting activity to capture it, that signal dissipates before it compounds into a rank move.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Sixteen Creators Are Shouting. Delanie's Has Not Shouted Back Yet.

playbook.headline: Claim the TikTok moment creators built
playbook.action: Open a TikTok account and post one video per week reposting or responding to the 17 creator videos already in circulation.

playbook.headline: Lift review sentiment with one policy fix
playbook.action: Address the order-correction policy that charged a customer for a shop error; one visible response and a corrected standard closes the gap between 60 and the family median of 79.

playbook.headline: Post more than three times a month
playbook.action: Instagram sat at 3 posts and 0 Reels in 30 days with a 16-day gap before last post; two Reels per month of the strawberry matcha build the visual catalog above the family median of 77.
